structured_payload_candidate.title: Exhaust Fan Start/Stop – Option a (Zone Group Occupied Mode)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Exhaust fan operates when any associated system supply fan is proven on and any associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any associated system supply fan is proven on AND any associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Exhaust fan shall operate when any of the associated system supply fans is proven on and any associated Zone Group  is in the Occupied Mode .

evidence_quote: a. Exhaust fan shall operate when any of the associated system supply fans is proven on and any associated Zone Group  is in the Occupied Mode .
evidence_text: a. Exhaust fan shall operate when any of the associated system supply fans is proven on and any associated Zone Group  is in the Occupied Mode .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Exhaust Fan Start/Stop – Option b (Room Temperature Control)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Exhaust fan cycles to maintain room temperature: runs when zone temperature rises above active cooling setpoint, stops when zone temperature falls more than 1°C (2°F) below active cooling setpoint for 2 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature rises above the active cooling setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Exhaust fan shall run until zone temperature falls more than 1°C (2°F) below the active cooling setpoint for 2 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. Exhaust fan shall run when zone temperature rises above the active cooling setpoint until zone temperature falls more than 1°C (2°F) below the active cooling setpoint for 2 minutes.

evidence_quote: b. Exhaust fan shall run when zone temperature rises above the active cooling setpoint until zone temperature falls more than 1°C (2°F) below the active cooling setpoint for 2 minutes.
evidence_text: b. Exhaust fan shall run when zone temperature rises above the active cooling setpoint until zone temperature falls more than 1°C (2°F) below the active cooling setpoint for 2 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Room Temperature Control Method Applicability
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The room temperature control method should only be used in non-occupied spaces where ventilation is not required (e.g., equipment rooms).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The room temperature control method should only be used in non -occupied spaces where ventilation is not required (e.g., equipment rooms).

evidence_quote: The room temperature control method should only be used in non -occupied spaces where ventilation is not required (e.g., equipment rooms).
evidence_text: The room temperature control method should only be used in non -occupied spaces where ventilation is not required (e.g., equipment rooms).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Maintenance Interval Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 4 alarm when fan has operated for more than 3,000 hours. Reset interval counter when alarm is acknowledged.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan has operated for more than 3,000 hours.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Maintenance interval alarm when fan has operated for mo re than 3,000 hours:  Level 4.  Reset interval counter when alarm is acknowledged.

evidence_quote: Maintenance interval alarm when fan has operated for mo re than 3,000 hours:  Level 4.  Reset interval counter when alarm is acknowledged.
evidence_text: Maintenance interval alarm when fan has operated for mo re than 3,000 hours:  Level 4.  Reset interval counter when alarm is acknowledged.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Status Mismatch Alarm – Commanded On, Status Off
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan is commanded on but status is off for 15 seconds, generate a Level 2 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan commanded on, status off for 15 seconds.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Commanded on, status off:  Level 2

evidence_quote: a. Commanded on, status off:  Level 2
evidence_text: a. Commanded on, status off:  Level 2

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Status Mismatch Alarm – Commanded Off, Status Off
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If fan is commanded off but status is off for 15 seconds, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan commanded off, status off for 15 seconds.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. Commanded off, status off:  Level 4

evidence_quote: b. Commanded off, status off:  Level 4
evidence_text: b. Commanded off, status off:  Level 4
